demographics.living_situation: lives with partner, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face feels like it is on fire, I cannot catch my breath, and the watery diarrhoea just will not stop.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has all flared up badly over the evening — the redness, the diarrhoea, and now a wheezy tight chest — and it got much worse after I had a drink.

symptom_narrative.onset: the flushing and watery diarrhoea have been escalating over the past 12 hours; the wheeze and breathlessness started in the last 2 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about 12 hours overall, with the breathing trouble for roughly 2 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning-hot red flushing across the face, neck and upper chest; profuse watery diarrhoea with tummy cramps; a tight, wheezy chest and hard-to-catch breathing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I feel like I cannot get enough air and the diarrhoea won't stop
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: flushing over the face, neck and upper chest; cramps in the tummy; tightness in the chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it comes in waves or episodes rather than being constant, and it got dramatically worse after I drank alcohol earlier tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: having a few alcoholic drinks earlier this evening set it off badly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my heart feels like it is racing; my ankles have been a bit puffy lately; and I have lost some weight without trying
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have had milder bouts of flushing and loose stools on and off for a while, but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't do anything — I'm stuck near the toilet and struggling to breathe

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: puffy ankles and some fluid problems on and off recently — never properly looked into
unintentional weight loss over recent months

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: had a few alcoholic drinks earlier this evening, which seemed to trigger the flare
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a partner who is present and helping

objective_data_offered.value: face, neck and upper chest look very flushed and red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video/phone link, not an examination

objective_data_offered.value: partner reports an audible wheeze and fast, laboured breathing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay description of a breathing sound, not auscultation

objective_data_offered.value: partner says she looks distressed and sweaty and keeps going to the toilet with watery diarrhoea
